name: yog
description: 研发业务知识库插件，用 docs/knowledge 维护业务上下文、能力、证据和 ADR。

interface.longDescription: Yog initializes and maintains docs/knowledge business context, capability, evidence, candidate, ADR, and generated routing indexes for agent-first repository work.
defaultPrompt: Use yog:init to initialize this repository.
Use yog:discover-candidates to discover context candidates for this project.
Use yog:sync-verify to sync and verify this docs/knowledge knowledge base.
Use Yog to review and promote a candidate into a formal context.
Use yog:business-flow to create a business-flow overview from existing contexts.
